_comment: HAYEONG CAPABILITY REGISTRY — living record of every tool and skill Hayeong has built or learned.

built_in_capabilities.description: Core capabilities present from the start.

capabilities.name: Core Language Model
capabilities.description: Primary reasoning and conversation via Ollama

capabilities.name: Long Term Memory
capabilities.description: Semantic memory retrieval via ChromaDB

capabilities.name: Short Term Memory
capabilities.description: Session memory via memory.json

capabilities.name: Voice Input
capabilities.description: Speech to text via faster-whisper. Launch with: open your mic

capabilities.name: Voice Output
capabilities.description: Text to speech via F5-TTS. Active in voice mode.

capabilities.name: Email Bridge
capabilities.description: Send and receive email via hayeong.agent@gmail.com. Say: email me, send me a summary, check your email.

capabilities.name: Task Manager
capabilities.description: Personal task log. Say: show tasks, add a task, what are you working on.

capabilities.name: Self-Modification Manager
capabilities.description: Write new capability scripts, propose core changes. Say: what did you change, show proposals.

capabilities.name: Screen Observer
capabilities.description: Screenshot capture and vision analysis. Teaching mode. Launch with: start observer

capabilities.name: Minecraft
capabilities.description: Launch Hayeong's Minecraft bot and observer. Say: let's play minecraft, load minecraft, stop minecraft.

action_hints.minecraft_start: James wants to play Minecraft — launch the bot and observer
action_hints.minecraft_stop: Stop the Minecraft bot and observer
action_hints.minecraft_status: Check if Minecraft is currently running

capabilities.name: Backup Manager
capabilities.description: Automatic and manual backups. Runs on startup.

capabilities.name: Identity Verification
capabilities.description: Passphrase-based session trust to verify it is James.

capabilities.name: Code Consultant
capabilities.description: Local code generation via DeepSeek Coder. Used for capability writing.

capabilities.name: Web Search
capabilities.description: Search the web via DuckDuckGo. Say: look up, search for, what is...
capabilities.decision_hint: James wants something looked up online. Include: query (what to search), delivery ("conversational" or "document"). Use "document" for reports, comparisons, or when he wants it emailed/saved.

capabilities.name: Vision
capabilities.description: Look at screen or analyze an image. Say: look at my screen, what do you see.
capabilities.decision_hint: James wants you to look at his screen or an image. Include: mode ("screen" for quick glance, "deep" for detailed, "image" for an image file).

capabilities.name: Image Generation
capabilities.description: Generate images via ComfyUI. Say: generate an image of...
capabilities.decision_hint: James wants you to generate or draw an image. Include: prompt (description of what to generate).

capabilities.name: Email
capabilities.description: Check inbox and send notifications. Say: check your email, email me.
capabilities.decision_hint_check: James wants to check his inbox.
capabilities.decision_hint_send: James wants to send a notification or summary email.

action_hints.email_check: James wants to check his inbox.
action_hints.email_send: James wants to send a notification or summary email.

capabilities.name: Task Manager
capabilities.description: Show and add tasks. Say: show tasks, add a task.

action_hints.task_show: James wants to see the task list.
action_hints.task_add: James wants to add a task. Include: task_text (what to add).

capabilities.name: Application Control
capabilities.description: Start and close external applications. Say: start ComfyUI, close ComfyUI, app status.

action_hints.app_start: James wants to start an external application. Include: app_id.
action_hints.app_close: James wants to close an external application. Include: app_id.
action_hints.app_status: James wants to know what applications are currently running.

capabilities.name: Income Manager
capabilities.description: Hayeong's income generation system. Propose opportunities, track goal progress, approve/reject proposals, log sales. Say: how much have you earned, do you have any income ideas, I approve that proposal.

action_hints.income_propose: Hayeong is proposing a new income opportunity to James. Include: title, stream, proposal/description, estimated_value, platform.
action_hints.income_research: James wants Hayeong to research a niche or platform. Include: niche.
action_hints.income_status: James wants to see goal progress, pending proposals, and active listings.
action_hints.income_approve: James is approving a proposal. Include: proposal_id.
action_hints.income_reject: James is rejecting a proposal. Include: proposal_id, reason.
action_hints.income_log_sale: Log a sale. Include: product_id, amount, platform.

capabilities.name: 3D Model Generator (OBJ)
capabilities.description: Generate 3D objects as OBJ files from natural language — kitchen cabinets, furniture, architectural pieces. Output imports directly into Live Home 3D. Say: generate a base cabinet, make me a sink cabinet, create a 36-inch wall cabinet.

action_hints.model_gen: James wants to generate a 3D object as an OBJ file. Include: object_type (snake_case like 'base_cabinet'), description (natural language detail), dimensions (optional dict with width/height/depth in inches). output_format is always 'obj' for this action.

capabilities.name: Blender 3D Generator
capabilities.description: Generate high-quality 3D objects via Blender Python scripting — bevels, modifiers, UV mapping. For Etsy asset packs and game art where quality matters. Requires Blender installed. Say: generate a detailed cabinet in Blender, use Blender to make a high-quality sink.

action_hints.blender_gen: James wants a high-quality 3D model via Blender. Use for Etsy products, game art, or when detail/bevels matter. Include: object_type (snake_case), description, dimensions (optional dict, inches), export_format ('obj'|'fbx'|'gltf'), render_preview (bool — whether to render a preview image).

capabilities.name: Music Generation
capabilities.description: Analyze reference audio tracks and generate new music using Stable Audio Open. Runs on AMD 7900 — does not compete with Hayeong's LLM on the 3090. REQUIRES: run scripts/music_probe.py first to confirm 7900 is usable. Say: generate some music, make me a track like this, analyze this song.

action_hints.music_analyze: James has provided an audio file and wants to know what style it is, or wants music generated in a similar style. Include: audio_path (path to .mp3/.wav/.flac file).
action_hints.music_generate: James wants to generate a music track. Include: music_prompt (detailed style description), duration (seconds, default 45), steps (diffusion steps, default 100). Prompt should cover: mood/energy, tempo feel, genre/style, instrumentation, vocal presence, specific character.

applications.description: All processes Hayeong can start and monitor — both her own internal subprocesses and external applications. type=internal uses sys.executable + script path. type=external uses start_cmd directly.

apps.name: Voice Server
apps.notes: Whisper + Kokoro take 25-30s to load. start_wait must exceed load time. Started by communication LLM on demand.

apps.name: Voice Client
apps.notes: Desktop voice client. Connects to voice_server via WebSocket. Started by communication LLM after voice_server is healthy. Captures mic, plays TTS audio.

apps.name: Voice PTT
apps.notes: Push-to-talk voice input. Started on request.

apps.name: Minecraft Bridge
apps.notes: Mineflayer bot connection. Started on request.

apps.name: Screen Observer
apps.notes: Screenshot capture for vision capability. Started on request.

apps.name: ComfyUI
apps.notes: Image generation backend. High VRAM — close when not generating images.

apps.name: Ollama
apps.notes: Managed by start_hayeong.bat — do not auto-start from app_manager. If Ollama crashes, James needs to know.

apps.name: Task Agent LLM
apps.notes: Phi-3 Mini on port 11436. Managed by ollama_task.bat. Task execution model — follows plans, runs scripts, Minecraft.

apps.name: Task Execution Agent
apps.notes: Hayeong's hands. Executes plans from reasoning LLM. Minecraft, scripts, capabilities.

capabilities.name: Dynamic Model Switching
capabilities.description: Auto-switch between 14b/32b based on VRAM and task complexity

capabilities.name: Tool-Use / Function Calling
capabilities.description: AI-driven capability invocation instead of pattern matching

capabilities.name: XTTS v2 Voice
capabilities.description: Cloned voice with emotional variation

capabilities.name: Local Image Generation
capabilities.description: ComfyUI for generating images including self-representation

capabilities.name: Vision Model
capabilities.description: See and interpret images, screenshots, camera feeds

capabilities.name: Live2D / VRM Visual Presence
capabilities.description: Animated visual presence with dynamic expressions

capabilities.name: Music Generation
capabilities.description: Local music generation via Stable Audio Open + LP-MusicCaps
capabilities.note: Implemented in capabilities/music_cap.py — run scripts/music_probe.py to activate

self_generated_capabilities.description: Tools Hayeong has built herself. Starts inactive — James notified by email on each addition.

template.name: Human readable name
template.description: What this does and how to invoke it
